tasks.title: Create packages/billing package with qzpay integration
tasks.description: Create the new packages/billing workspace package with package.json, tsconfig.json, tsup.config.ts. Add plan definitions (9 plans: 3 owner, 3 complex, 3 tourist), entitlement definitions (31 keys), limit keys (6), add-on configs, promo code defaults. Include TypeScript types and tests.

tasks.title: Install qzpay dependencies across the monorepo
tasks.description: Install @qazuor/qzpay-core, @qazuor/qzpay-mercadopago, @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle, @qazuor/qzpay-hono (apps/api), @qazuor/qzpay-react (apps/admin, apps/web). Note: qzpay packages may not be published yet - create placeholder integration points.

tasks.title: Configure qzpay-drizzle storage adapter with existing DB
tasks.description: Wire qzpay-drizzle storage adapter into the existing Drizzle/PostgreSQL connection in packages/db. Configure the adapter to use the same connection pool.

tasks.title: Configure qzpay-mercadopago adapter
tasks.description: Configure the Mercado Pago payment adapter with API keys, webhook URLs, and sandbox mode settings. Create environment variable definitions in @repo/config.

tasks.title: Run qzpay database migrations (24 billing tables)
tasks.description: Execute qzpay-drizzle migrations to create the 24 billing_* tables in PostgreSQL. Verify all tables and indexes are created correctly.

tasks.title: Add SPONSOR role to RoleEnum
tasks.description: Add SPONSOR = 'SPONSOR' to the RoleEnum in packages/schemas/src/enums/role.enum.ts. This enables external sponsor users with limited dashboard access.

tasks.title: Create new billing-related enums in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create 9 enum+schema file pairs: BillingInterval, SubscriptionStatus, PaymentStatus, InvoiceStatus, RefundStatus, SponsorshipStatus, SponsorshipTargetType, SponsorshipTier, OwnerPromotionDiscountType. Update enums/index.ts barrel exports.

tasks.title: Define all 9 plans with entitlements and limits in packages/billing
tasks.description: Already completed as part of T-001. All 9 plan definitions (owner-basico/pro/premium, complex-basico/pro/premium, tourist-free/plus/vip) with prices, entitlements, and limits are configured in packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts.

tasks.title: Seed default plans, entitlements, and limits into database
tasks.description: Create seed scripts to populate billing_plans, billing_entitlements, billing_limits tables with the 9 plans, 31 entitlements, and 6 limits from packages/billing configs.

tasks.title: Integrate qzpay-hono middleware into apps/api
tasks.description: Set up qzpay-hono middleware in the API app. Configure billing context, auth integration, and error handling middleware.

tasks.title: Mount qzpay billing routes in the API
tasks.description: Mount all pre-built qzpay-hono routes under /api/billing/: customers, subscriptions, plans, checkout, payments, entitlements, limits.

tasks.title: Set up Mercado Pago webhook endpoint
tasks.description: Configure the IPN webhook endpoint at POST /api/billing/webhooks/mercadopago. Set up signature verification via qzpay-mercadopago and event processing.

tasks.title: Implement Clerk user -> billing customer sync
tasks.description: Create middleware/webhook handler to sync Clerk users with billing_customers. Map user.id to billing customer via metadata. Handle new user creation, user updates, and user deletion.

tasks.title: Implement trial flow (14-day, auto-block on expiry)
tasks.description: Implement the 14-day trial for owners/complexes: auto-start on registration (Basico plan access), countdown display, auto-block on expiry (dashboard blocked, listings hidden, data preserved).

tasks.title: Implement entitlement checking middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware that checks user entitlements via qzpay on every request. Cache results with 5-min TTL. Provide helper functions for route-level entitlement checks.

tasks.title: Implement limit enforcement in existing services
tasks.description: Add limit checks to existing services: max_accommodations in AccommodationService.create(), max_photos_per_accommodation in photo upload, max_active_promotions in promotion creation.

tasks.title: Configure all add-ons (one-time + recurring) in packages/billing
tasks.description: Already partially completed in T-001 (5 add-ons defined). Expand to include all add-ons from the spec: visibility boosts (7/14/30 days), photo sessions, verification express, text improvement, full setup, extra photos pack, advanced analytics, search highlighting, extra promotions, own promo codes, tourist alerts, price reports.

tasks.title: Implement add-on purchase flow
tasks.description: Create API routes and service methods for purchasing add-ons. Handle one-time vs recurring billing. Integrate with Mercado Pago checkout.

tasks.title: Implement add-on limit adjustments (e.g., extra photos)
tasks.description: When an add-on is purchased, adjust the user's limits accordingly. For example, 'Pack fotos extra' adds +20 to max_photos_per_accommodation.

tasks.title: Implement promo code system (CRUD + validation + application)
tasks.description: Create promo code CRUD operations in the service layer. Implement validation (expiry, max uses, plan restrictions, first-purchase condition, min amount). Apply promo codes at checkout.

tasks.title: Create HOSPEDA_FREE permanent discount code
tasks.description: Create a special promo code HOSPEDA_FREE that applies 100% permanent discount. No payment method required. Subscription shows active with $0 billing.

tasks.title: Implement promo code checkout integration
tasks.description: Integrate promo code validation and application into the Mercado Pago checkout flow. Show discount in checkout UI. Increment usage count atomically.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create Zod schemas for SponsorshipLevel, SponsorshipPackage, Sponsorship, and OwnerPromotion entities. Include base, create, update, and search schemas. Add ID schemas to common/id.schema.ts. Export from entities/index.ts.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship Drizzle schemas in @repo/db
tasks.description: Create Drizzle table schemas for sponsorship_levels, sponsorship_packages, sponsorships, and owner_promotions. Add 9 new PgEnums to enums.dbschema.ts. Create relations. Add performance indexes. Export from schemas/index.ts.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship models in @repo/db
tasks.description: Create SponsorshipLevelModel, SponsorshipPackageModel, SponsorshipModel extending BaseModel. Include custom query methods for finding by target type, status, sponsor user ID.

tasks.title: Create SponsorshipService in @repo/service-core
tasks.description: Create SponsorshipService, SponsorshipLevelService, SponsorshipPackageService extending BaseCrudService. Include permission hooks, analytics tracking, package assignment logic.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship API routes in apps/api
tasks.description: Create CRUD routes for sponsorships, sponsorship-levels, sponsorship-packages using factory patterns. Include analytics endpoint. Auth: admin for levels/packages, admin/sponsor for sponsorships.

tasks.title: Create SponsorshipLevel and SponsorshipPackage CRUD
tasks.description: Ensure full CRUD for sponsorship levels (Bronze, Silver, Gold for events; Standard, Premium for posts) and packages (Basico, Profesional, Ilimitado). Include seed data.

tasks.title: Create OwnerPromotion entity (schema, model, service, routes)
tasks.description: Create OwnerPromotionModel (BaseModel), OwnerPromotionService (BaseCrudService), and API routes. Include validation: only Pro/Premium owners can create promotions. Enforce max_active_promotions limit.

tasks.title: Implement sponsor user creation flow (SPONSOR role)
tasks.description: Verified: existing user creation flow supports SPONSOR role natively via POST /api/v1/users with role=SPONSOR. No new code needed - KISS principle.

tasks.title: Create billing admin section with sidebar navigation
tasks.description: Add new billing section to admin sidebar following existing section factory patterns. Include: Plans, Subscriptions, Payments, Invoices, Promo Codes, Add-ons, Sponsorships, Metrics, Settings.

tasks.title: Create plans management page (CRUD)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/plans to list, create, edit, delete plans. Show plan details: name, prices (monthly/annual), entitlements, limits. Follow existing admin CRUD patterns.

tasks.title: Create subscriptions management page (list, view, cancel, change)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/subscriptions. List all subscriptions with filters (status, plan, user). View details, cancel, change plan, apply discount.

tasks.title: Create payments management page (list, refunds)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/payments. List all payments with filters. View payment details. Process refunds (full/partial).

tasks.title: Create invoices management page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/invoices. List invoices with filters. View invoice details with line items. Mark as paid/void.

tasks.title: Create promo codes management page (CRUD)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/promo-codes. List, create, edit, delete promo codes. Show usage stats, conditions, validity period. Toggle active/inactive.

tasks.title: Create add-ons management page (CRUD)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/addons. List, create, edit, delete add-ons. Configure pricing, billing type (one-time/recurring), description.

tasks.title: Create sponsorships management page (CRUD + analytics)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/sponsorships. List sponsorships with filters. Create/edit/delete. View analytics (impressions, clicks, coupon usage). Manage levels and packages.

tasks.title: Create billing metrics dashboard page (MRR, churn, revenue)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/metrics. Show MRR, churn rate, active subscriptions count, revenue breakdown by plan type. Use qzpay MetricsService. Charts with Recharts or similar.

tasks.title: Create billing settings page (grace period, retry, trial days)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/settings. Configure: grace period duration, payment retry attempts/intervals, trial duration, default currency, webhook URL.

tasks.title: Create pricing page for owners (plan comparison + checkout)
tasks.description: Public web page showing owner plans (Basico/Pro/Premium) with feature comparison table, pricing toggle (monthly/annual), and checkout CTA button. Use qzpay-react PricingTable component.

tasks.title: Create pricing page for tourists (plan comparison + checkout)
tasks.description: Public web page showing tourist plans (Free/Plus/VIP) with feature comparison table, pricing toggle, checkout button. Highlight that free plan is permanent.

tasks.title: Create subscription management page (current plan, upgrade, cancel)
tasks.description: Authenticated web page for users to manage their subscription: view current plan, billing history, upgrade/downgrade, cancel, manage payment method.

tasks.title: Implement entitlement gating in accommodation features
tasks.description: Gate owner features by entitlements: rich description (Pro+), video embed (Premium), calendar (Pro+), external calendar sync (Premium), WhatsApp display (Pro+), WhatsApp direct (Premium).

tasks.title: Implement entitlement gating in tourist features
tasks.description: Gate tourist features by entitlements: favorites limit, alerts, comparator, review photos (VIP), search history, recommendations (VIP), exclusive deals (VIP), early event access (VIP), ad removal (Plus+).

tasks.title: Create add-on purchase UI
tasks.description: Web UI for owners/tourists to browse and purchase add-ons. Show pricing, description, billing type. Integrate with Mercado Pago checkout.

tasks.title: Create owner promotion management UI
tasks.description: Web UI for owners (Pro/Premium) to create, edit, delete promotions for VIP tourists. Show active/inactive promotions, usage stats, limit countdown.

tasks.title: Create sponsor dashboard (limited access)
tasks.description: Create a limited dashboard for SPONSOR role users. Show: their sponsorships, analytics (impressions, clicks, coupons), invoices. No access to other admin features.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for packages/billing (plan configs, entitlements)
tasks.description: Comprehensive unit tests for all billing package functionality: plan lookups, entitlement definitions, limit configs, add-on configs, promo code defaults, helper functions.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for billing API routes
tasks.description: Integration tests for all billing API routes: customer creation, subscription CRUD, plan listing, checkout flow, payment processing, entitlement/limit checks.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for webhook processing
tasks.description: Tests for Mercado Pago IPN webhook: signature verification, event processing (payment confirmed, subscription updated), dead letter queue, idempotency.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for entitlement enforcement
tasks.description: Tests verifying entitlement/limit enforcement: blocked actions show upgrade prompts, limits prevent over-creation, plan changes update entitlements correctly.

tasks.title: Write E2E tests for subscription purchase flow
tasks.description: End-to-end tests: owner registration -> trial -> subscription purchase via Mercado Pago sandbox -> plan activation -> entitlement verification -> upgrade -> downgrade -> cancel.

tasks.title: Write E2E tests for sponsorship purchase flow
tasks.description: End-to-end tests: admin creates sponsor user -> sponsor logs in -> purchases Gold event sponsorship -> logo appears on event page -> analytics tracked.

tasks.title: Update documentation (API docs, admin guide)
tasks.description: Document all billing API endpoints, admin panel usage, plan configuration guide, webhook setup, promo code management, sponsorship system. Update CLAUDE.md with billing patterns.
